description: CompositionYellow, burgundy and grey rubber basket ball made with synthetic rubber, wide channels and female silhouetteCare1. Rub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine washEnhance your performance level with this NBA Certified Basketball from spalding. The NBA’s commitment to encourage women to play basketball is reflected in this NBA4her ball which comes in a yellow, burgundy and grey combination, coupled with a purple female silhouette. Engineered with spalding technology, its top grade rubber cover and wide channels make it a perfect ball for court games.
